overall.description: A static cinematic view from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the Night City waterfront at dusk. The camera overlooks choppy waters toward a futuristic skyline with neon-lit buildings under an overcast orange sky. A small drone briefly flies across the frame midway through the clip.

events.description: small automated drone enters frame from right side and flies across the sky
drone exits frame to the left, returning to empty sky

agents.ego_description: standing stationary on waterfront promenade, observing the city skyline and water

notable_agents.action: small drone flying horizontally from right to left across the sky between buildings

entered.detail: large industrial building with distinctive green neon 'softsys' signage
metal safety barrier separating promenade from water
cluster of futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows against dusk sky
choppy dark water with whitecaps in foreground
hazy silhouetted mountains on the horizon

segments.scene_description: A static panoramic view of a cyberpunk waterfront at dusk. The camera faces across choppy waters toward the Night City skyline, dominated by the Softsys building's green neon sign on the right. The overcast sky glows with warm orange hues. Midway through, a small drone flies across the sky from right to left, the only movement in the otherwise still scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic vista of a futuristic waterfront that remains poised in a state of atmospheric stillness. It begins with a wide panoramic view across choppy waters, facing a dense skyline dominated by the glowing green neon sign of the Softsys building. As the camera holds its position, the overcast sky maintains a warm, heavy orange glow that casts a moody light over the urban horizon. The scene then introduces a brief moment of motion as a small drone glides across the sky from right to left, before the view returns to the quiet, imposing presence of the neon-lit city.
